_comment: Per-stack deploy manifest (Phase 9B). target=terraform → CD runs `terraform apply` in terraform_dir; secrets[] = the env-var names this stack needs (UPPERCASE; map to TF_VAR_<lowercase>). tfvars.sh reads this to grep the right PROD_VALUEs from the unified root .env.local; 9E's CD reads it to inject the right GitHub Secrets. Single source of truth for 'which stack needs which secrets + where it deploys'.
